Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}So I figured this might be a good time to update our team uniform.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}What do you think of switching to running tights? They say it reduces wind resistance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Heeey, look over there. It's Nishiwaki-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Is that your new boyfriend?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}On to the next one already, I see. Impressive, Nishiwaki-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}We're not dating. He's just a friend from the team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Come on, no need to act all polite in front of him. Just tell it how it is.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}I'm surprised you could even get such a handsome guy. Maybe I should become a team manager, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}You've got it all wrong, as usual.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Don't do it. You'll just be running around after everyone all day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}And it's not very attractive for a girl to be so muscular, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Hey, not so loud, her boyfriend's like, right here. I kinda feel bad for her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}If that's really what you want to do, I won't stop you. But you're better off looking for a boyfriend elsewhere.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}A manager is a busy job. You won't have time to go around sticking gum on people's shoe lockers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Wh-What on earth are you talking about? I-I haven't got a clue what that means.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Of course not. It was just a random example.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}What's wrong? Did I say something to offend you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}H-Hey, let's just go already.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Sorry you got dragged into that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I guess I kind of know them, but not very well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I should probably fill you in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}No, you shouldn't have to deal with that. I'm sorry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I should probably fill you in, before you get the wrong idea about me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}That girl in the black tights... We went to the same middle school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Back then, there was this boy on the basketball team who asked me out, and we started dating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}But it turns out, he was seeing her at the same time![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}When she found out, she said I "stole" her boyfriend, even though I was a victim, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}She blamed me because I was the manager of the basketball team. Isn't that just ridiculous?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}And after I became the track team manager here in high school, that set her off on me again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}But really, all I want to do is support others so they can be the best they can be.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Remember the gum on my locker? That was probably her doing. She's definitely the type to hold a grudge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Oh, those girls have way too much time on their hands. All they do is complain and gossip.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Why don't they do something more productive!? They're the ones who should get a lecture from Ekoda![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}"You're not putting enough thought into your future!" Tell that to them, not me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}...Oh! That reminds me, sorry for what they said about you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}They called you my boyfriend. That must have made you feel awkward, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}How can you say that with a straight face? And how many other girls have you used that line on, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}When it comes to relationships, you should never play with a woman's emotions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}B-But you should mind a little, right!? I'm a high school girl after all, you know![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Y-You don't have to be so blunt about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Huh, why do I feel this way...? I mean, you're just a guy on the same team as me, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Make sure you don't tell Kaz or anyone else about the two-timing thing, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}I broke up with that two-timing jerk a long time ago, just so you know![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Uh, you might be thinking, "So what," right? Yeah, what am I saying, haha...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko seems flustered for some reason.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Well, that dragged on. It's late, we should be getting home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After saying goodbye to Yuko,[n]I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
